hero.title: 58 years of code transforming retail
hero.subtitle: NEXGEN is the complete cloud ERP that manages your store network — from inventory to BI, from tax compliance to financials. Microsoft Azure infrastructure.

problem.title: Is your retail still relying on spreadsheets and manual controls?
problem.solution_desc: A single integrated system that connects all stores, automates tax compliance, and puts BI in your hands.

modules.title: Modules that cover every operation
modules.subtitle: Each NEXGEN module was built with 58 years of real retail experience.
modules.retaguarda_desc: Catalog, inventory, purchasing, stocktaking — all integrated in real time.
modules.frente_desc: POS with integrated EFT, agreements, own credit plans, campaigns.
modules.fiscal_desc: CF-e, NFC-e, NF-e, SPED, DIFAL, CEST — fully automated compliance.
modules.financeiro_desc: Payables/receivables, automatic P&L, card reconciliation, credit bureau.
modules.bi_desc: Integrated Power BI — sales, revenue, inventory, financial dashboards.
modules.entrega_desc: Routes, vehicles, assembly, satisfaction surveys — total logistics control.
modules.tablet_desc: Mobile selling with product suggestions and multi-store availability.

segments.title: Tailored solutions for your segment
segments.subtitle: NEXGEN has native processes for every retail type.
segments.oticas_desc: Optical lab, diopter control, work orders, Luxottica STAR integration.
segments.varejo_desc: Fashion, electronics, furniture, department stores — complete chain management.
segments.autopecas_desc: Technical catalog, vehicle compatibility, size grid control.
segments.moda_desc: Color and size grids, collections, seasonal campaigns, franchises.

testimonials.title: Clients who trust Secrel
testimonials.emilio_text: As clients of Grupo Secrel for over 30 years, we attest to our satisfaction and witness their constant pioneering and permanent investment in improving processes and services.

differentials.title: Why NEXGEN is the safe choice
differentials.experience_desc: One of the longest-standing IT companies in Brazil.
differentials.cloud_desc: Microsoft Azure, SQL Server and Oracle — global scalability.
differentials.support_desc: Multichannel service with dedicated success consulting.
differentials.deploy_desc: Remote training + AI conversational agent for questions.
differentials.bi_desc: Native Power BI — sales, inventory and financial dashboards.

pricing_preview.title: Transparent investment
pricing_preview.subtitle: No surprises. Clear pricing from the first contact.
pricing_preview.small_plan_desc: Optical stores without lab, single locations

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Direct answers to your main questions.

cta_final.title: Discover how NEXGEN transforms your retail
cta_final.subtitle: Request a free diagnostic and receive a personalized plan for your operation.

footer.description: Technology and Innovative Solutions for Brazilian retail since 1967.
